gate_a_concourse: Evacuation path via Weller Street Bridge. Capacity limit: 5000. Step-free access available. Priority route for reduced-mobility fans.
gate_b_concourse: Evacuation path via North Plaza. Capacity limit: 4500. Elevator access at Level 2. Secondary accessible route.
gate_c_concourse: Evacuation path via East Service Road. Capacity limit: 4000. Steward-guided evacuation only.
gate_d_concourse: Evacuation path via South Transit Hub. Capacity limit: 5500. Direct bus connection to parking lots.
south_plaza: Evacuation path to Parking Lot C. Capacity limit: 12000. Open-air assembly point. Medical triage staging area.
north_plaza: Evacuation path to Parking Lot A. Capacity limit: 10000. Covered waiting area available. Hydration station active.
east_plaza: Evacuation path to Transit Hub East. Capacity limit: 8000. Rail platform access. Wheelchair assistance available.
west_plaza: Evacuation path to Rideshare Zone W. Capacity limit: 7000. Sheltered pickup area.
main_concourse: Primary circulation route. Capacity limit: 8000. Bidirectional flow management active. Width: 12m effective.
upper_concourse: Upper level circulation. Capacity limit: 6000. Elevator banks at sections 8, 16, 24. Ramp access at section 1.
lower_concourse: Lower level circulation. Capacity limit: 7000. Direct pitch-level emergency exits. Medical room at section 12.
east_concourse: Secondary circulation route. Capacity limit: 6000. Accessible restrooms at sections 4-6. Family area.
west_concourse: Secondary circulation route. Capacity limit: 5500. Medical station at section 12. Defibrillator location.
vip_entrance: Dedicated VIP evacuation via underground tunnel. Capacity limit: 1500. Private medical suite. Secure escort available.
media_center: Media evacuation via service corridors. Capacity limit: 2000. Equipment storage lockdown protocol active.
fan_zone_east: Open-air fan zone. Evacuation to East Parking. Capacity limit: 15000. Large screen viewing area.
fan_zone_west: Open-air fan zone. Evacuation to West Transit Hub. Capacity limit: 12000. Food court and merchandise.
fan_zone_north: Open-air fan zone. Evacuation to North Lot. Capacity limit: 10000. Cultural exhibition area.
parking_lot_a: North parking facility. Vehicle capacity: 5000. Emergency vehicle staging lane. ADA accessible spaces: 200.
parking_lot_b: East parking facility. Vehicle capacity: 4000. Shuttle pickup point. Overflow lot for rideshare.
parking_lot_c: South parking facility. Vehicle capacity: 6000. Primary post-match exit route. Traffic management active.
transit_hub_main: Main public transit hub. Rail + bus connections. Capacity limit: 8000 waiting. Accessible platforms.
medical_station_1: Primary medical facility. 20-bed capacity. ALS-equipped. Helicopter landing zone nearby.
medical_station_2: Secondary medical facility. 10-bed capacity. BLS-equipped. Pharmacy on-site.
command_center: Match-day operations command post. Restricted access. CCTV monitoring hub. Direct line to emergency services.
